data.title: BNB Plus Corp. Announces Review of Strategic Alternatives to Maximize Shareholder Value
data.description: BNB Plus Corp. (Nasdaq: BNBX), a digital asset treasury company specializing in Binance's BNB token, shared plans for a strategic review to enhance shareholder value. The Board of Directors approved exploring options such as mergers or reverse mergers to achieve this objective. Additionally, the company updated the status of its Nasdaq listing. The strategic review aims to optimize the treasury value and maximize benefits for stakeholders. Stay tuned for further developments in this process.

data.title: Surf Air Mobility Improves Annual Adjusted EBITDA Guidance by Approximately 40% While Maintaining 20% to 30% Annual Revenue Growth Guidance
data.description: In Los Angeles, Surf Air Mobility Inc. (NYSE: SRFM) shared updated guidance for 2026, revealing a revised Adjusted EBITDA loss estimate ranging from $25 million to $30 million. This marks a notable 40% enhancement compared to the previous projection of $40 million to $50 million. The improvement is credited to the integration of the Company's SurfOSTM software, which has resulted in cost reduction and expedited deployment throughout its operations. Surf Air Mobility has also reiterated its commitment to achieving its strategic goals.

data.title: Accelsius Announces General Availability of NeuCool® IR150 and Launches NeuCool HyperStart Program at Data Center World 2026
data.description: Accelsius, a prominent company specializing in two-phase, direct-to-chip liquid cooling for AI and high-performance computing, revealed the launch of their latest product, the NeuCool® IR150. This innovative rack-level cooling solution is the first of its kind in the industry, incorporating a two-phase Coolant Distribution Unit (CDU), 42U of IT rack space, and integrated liquid and vapor manifolds within a single 800mm-wide enclosure. The NeuCool® IR150 provides a capacity of up to 150kW and has been completely redesigned to enhance performance and efficiency.

data.title: Agi to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 5, 2026
data.description: In São Paulo, Agi Inc (NYSE: AGBK), a prominent provider of specialized financial services in Brazil, has revealed plans to unveil its Q1 2026 financial results on May 5, 2026, post-market closure. A conference call to review these results is scheduled for 5:00pm ET (6:00pm BRT) on the same day. Access the live conference call via Zoom webinar using ID: 833 2928 3838 and Password: 010443. Stay tuned for more updates.

data.title: The Plumbing Sales Coach expands offerings with new Blueprint training program
data.description: A recent development aims to assist plumbing businesses in enhancing their efficiency and customer satisfaction amidst anticipated labor deficits. On April 20, 2026, in Indianapolis, The Plumbing Sales Coach, a firm offering coaching and training services to service plumbing experts, announced an expansion initiative. This endeavor seeks to address potential labor shortages in the industry, enabling companies to improve their performance.

data.title: UTAH BUILDER HAMLET HOMES, FROM SEASON SIX OF ROCK THE BLOCK, REFLECTS ON THE NEW SEASON SEVEN EPISODES ON HGTV
data.description: Four families have recently moved into the homes featured in the sixth season of Rock The Block in Grantsville, Utah. The popular home renovation show premiered its seventh season in Las Vegas, Nevada last week. Rock The Block is HGTV's top-rated program and has gained significant popularity over the years. The show's previous season garnered a high viewership of [include specific number if provided in the original text].

data.title: EnrollHere Inc. Announces Investment from Aquiline to Advance Technology for Medicare Advantage Distribution
data.description: An investment has been made to enhance enrollment quality, compliance, and lifetime value using an AI-powered system for insurance distribution. EnrollHere Inc., based in New York and Pinehurst, N.C., announced on April 20, 2026, its platform and system of record for insurance will be bolstered with the investment. This move aims to improve overall enrollment standards and ensure compliance, while also increasing the long-term value generated for stakeholders.

data.title: HONEYWELL TO SELL PRODUCTIVITY SOLUTIONS AND SERVICES BUSINESS TO BRADY CORPORATION
data.description: Honeywell, listed as Nasdaq: HON, is fast-tracking its efforts to streamline its portfolio in preparation for the anticipated spin-off of its Aerospace division. The planned separation is expected to be completed in the third quarter of 2026. The company, headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, revealed on April 20, 2026, that it has reached an agreement to divest its Productivity Solutions and Services segment.

data.title: Kraig Biocraft Laboratories Advances Record Production and Begins Processing 1.8 Metric Tons of Recombinant Spider Silk Cocoons
data.description: Kraig Biocraft Laboratories, trading under the ticker symbol KBLB, recently started the conversion of approximately 1.8 metric tons of genetically engineered spider silk cocoons into refined reeled silk.

data.title: Guide Sets a New Standard for Industrial Thermography at Hannover Messe 2026
data.description: Today in Hannover, Germany, Hannover Messe 2026 kicked off at the Exhibition Grounds. Guide presented its complete range of Thermography Tools and Integrated IoT solutions at Hall 27, Stand H11. The exhibit drew a significant crowd, with attendees eager to learn about the latest offerings.

data.title: SKYWORTH Dominates the 139th Canton Fair with Revolutionary OLED, RGB, and QD-MiniLED Smart TVs, Redefining Global Display Technology
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, the 139th China Import and Export Fair (Canton Fair) commenced on April 15th, 2026. The event is jointly organized by the Ministry of Commerce of China and the People's Government of Guangdong Province. Skyworth Group, a prominent enterprise, is participating in the fair.

data.title: Pediatrix Medical Group 2026 First Quarter Conference Call/Webcast Scheduled for Tuesday, May 5, 2026
data.description: A conference call and webcast for the 2026 First Quarter with Pediatrix Medical Group is set for Tuesday, May 5, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. The call will provide updates on the group's performance during the first quarter of the year. This event is crucial for investors, analysts, and stakeholders interested in the company's progress. Participants can join online or via the call and access important financial information and insights. It presents a valuable opportunity to understand the company's growth and future prospects.

data.title: AECOM announces planned dates for second quarter fiscal 2026 earnings results and conference call
data.description: AECOM (ACM), a global infrastructure leader, plans to release its Q2 fiscal 2026 earnings after the US market closes on May 11, 2026. Following this, they will conduct a conference call and webcast for analysts and investors on May 12, 2026, at 8 a.m. ET / 7 a.m. CT. The management will discuss financial results, strategic achievements, and business insights during this event.

data.title: Ingles Markets Issues Open Letter to Shareholders
data.description: Asheville-based Ingles Markets, Incorporated (NASDAQ: IMKTA) released an open letter to shareholders addressing recent developments. In efforts to elect two qualified director nominees, Rebekah Lowe and Dwight Jacobs, the company is actively working to prevent potential harm from the Sacklers’ nominee, Rory Held. The company has been proactive over the last few weeks, striving to safeguard its interests and shareholder value.
Company to repurchase up to 1 million shares in $500 million buyback program. #stockrepurchase #investing

data.title: ANI Pharmaceuticals Announces the FDA Approval and Launch of Pimozide Tablets with 180 Day CGT Exclusivity
data.description: ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc., headquartered in Princeton, New Jersey, revealed on April 20, 2026, the introduction of Pimozide Tablets in two strengths - 1 mg and 2 mg. The tablets, generic versions of the RLD Orap®, have been launched by ANI under the Nasdaq symbol ANIP.

data.title: Evidence Supporting Combined Use of Deucrictibant IR with Deucrictibant XR Presented at CIIC Spring 2026 Conference
data.description: In Zug, Switzerland on April 20, 2026, Pharvaris, traded on Nasdaq as PHVS, a company in the later stages of biopharmaceutical development, is working on innovative oral medications known as bradykinin B2 receptor antagonists. These drugs are aimed at meeting the needs of individuals affected by bradykinin-mediated conditions like hereditary angioedema (HAE) and acquired angioedema due to C1 inhibitor deficiency (AAE-C1INH). At the Consortium of Independent Immunology Clinics (CIIC) Spring 2026 Conference held in Arlington, TX from April 17-19, 2026, Pharvaris shared findings on the safety profiles of administering deucrictibant immediate-release (IR) capsules alongside deucrictibant extended-release (XR) tablets. This research is crucial for understanding the compatibility and possible benefits of combining these forms of medication for patients.

data.title: Step inside Efficient, Healthy, Sustainable Buildings at the 2026 Passive House Network Conference
data.description: The Passive House Network Conference is set to take place on June 4th and 5th at Hotel Marcel in New Haven, Connecticut. This event will bring together building science experts from various countries to highlight the significance of Passive House as the leading standard for building performance. Scheduled for June 4th and 5th, the conference will serve as a platform for sharing knowledge and innovations.
